# Glasser UAE — Glasser Technical Works LLC

> Dubai-based specialists in premium glass and aluminium solutions: frameless partitions, shower enclosures, aluminium doors and windows, custom mirrors and architectural facades across the UAE.

Glasser Technical Works LLC has been delivering high-end glass and aluminium installations to villas, offices, hotels and commercial projects across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah and the wider UAE since 2009.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, featured projects and contact details.
- [About](/about): Company background, experience and approach.
- [Services](/services): Frameless glass, aluminium doors & windows, shower enclosures, mirrors, facades.
- [Projects](/projects): Portfolio of completed glass and aluminium installations.
- [Blog](/blog): Insights and guides on glass and aluminium design in the UAE.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, address and free-quote request form.
